sentences.text: Dreaming of a pristine JDM legend but sick of Australia's overpriced, thrashed local market?

visual_assets.prompt: A pristine, classic JDM legend car, like a Nissan Skyline R34 or Toyota Supra MK4, highly detailed, realistic rendering, isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style, studio lighting.

A stylized graphic icon representing high prices, like a dollar sign with an upward-pointing arrow and several currency symbols, red color, bold and sharp lines, isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style.

A graphic icon representing something damaged or worn out, like a broken gear or a rusty wrench, with visible cracks and scratches, dark and grimy texture, isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style.

A mundane, generic, and slightly faded sedan car, depicted as uninspired and ordinary, representing the concept of 'settling' for less, isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style, neutral lighting, 8k, photorealistic.

sentences.text: Carbarn AU sources premium, high-grade beasts directly from Japan’s exclusive auctions.

visual_assets.prompt: An ultra-modern, aggressive-looking high-performance Japanese sports car, like a modified JDM drift car or a supercar, showing immense power and precision, representing a 'beast', isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style, dynamic angle, studio lighting, hyper-realistic, 8k.

A stylized illustration of a high-end auction house environment in Japan, focusing on a raised podium with a minimalist gavel, subtly incorporating Japanese design motifs, representing 'Japan's exclusive auctions', isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style, elegant, modern, 8k.

sentences.text: From shipping to compliance, they handle it all so you just get the keys.

visual_assets.prompt: A modern, minimalist icon representing global shipping, with a stylized cargo container and a world map outline, isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style, highly detailed.
A sleek, professional icon representing legal compliance, with a document showing a checkmark and a gavel or scales of justice, isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style, highly detailed.
A close-up, hyper-realistic 3D render of a modern car key fob with a prominent unlock button, isolated on a solid white background, studio lighting, die-cut style.

sentences.text: Import your dream ride today with Carbarn AU.

visual_assets.prompt: An illustrative icon depicting a car being unloaded from a shipping container or a cargo ship, symbolizing international vehicle import, isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style, vibrant colors.

A low-angle, cinematic shot of a generic, luxurious sports car (e.g., a sleek, modern coupe) in an aspirational metallic color, gleaming under soft light, isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style.

A clean, modern 3D render of a stylized logo or text for 'Carbarn AU', incorporating subtle elements related to cars or a barn structure, professional and sleek design, isolated on a solid white background, die-cut style.
